reviews.review_description: I love this game from the cartoon graphics to the spider man swinging it’s a perfect 5 stars for me I’d rate higher if I could
It crashed my quest and now it refuses to turn on. It just has the music playing

reviews.review_title: A beta with potential and not much else
reviews.review_description:
Has huge potential as a concept to stand on its own but no one is ever on and half the game doesnt work right. It needs an open spawn in point which puts you already online and interacting with other players, more game modes, more customizations, etc.
The whole world should be one open lobby and there needs to be less artificial limitations shooting you out of the sky.

First of all, this game has a LOT of potential. Its absolutely crazy! For starters, the graphics might be a little eh..But the actual gameplay? Its on a whole different level. When i first got the game and did the tutorial, i already knew i was gonna love it..(SPOILER ALERT) First off, just the lobby alone, is AMAZING. Theres different characters scattered around the whole city, with their own voice actors, personalitie , and own dialogue choices! How crazy cool is that?! You also get to roam around freely in a futuristic environment with five (or six i forgot) different discricts, divdided with their own unique designs, functionstions, and dialogue! Like for instance, the Reaper District is a world of food!! (For players): Once you get in, it might seem a little sketchy, but when you get to know how it works, its actually worth your time if your bored of the same 56 games you have when you don’t even play half of them. Im running out of typing space so uhh..yea. Keep up the good work devs.
The only issue I have with the game is that I think the city part could be bigger, if the devs were to extend the map JUST for swinging around and having fun then it would be peak

It is a fun game very exciting and easy to learn. However the starting hud with join random might land them in training and then they do not know what to do one kid said "I'm uninstalling this game it is boring and there is nothing to do." However it is fun and I just do not see enough players to get good content if there were more active players then it would be a lot better and definitely need a more accessible remember me button.
Goog goog goog goog Goog goog goog goog Goog goog goog goog Goog goog goog goog goog

reviews.review_title: Best Esport game out on Vr
reviews.review_description:
The beginning log in can be laggy but other then that the game is an amazing Vr experience with a healthy community.

Coming from an Vs player it is a game they you can easily get sucked into with exciting new features around every corner. The game is super well made (even though it’s free) and I really enjoy playing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, Happy you are enjoying!

reviews.review_title: Excellent movement but I got motion sick
reviews.review_description: While playing I found myself lost in the excellent and exiting movement. So much so that I ended up with a pretty nasty headache by the end of my play session. This is most likely something wrong with me so I highly recommend the game
Hell yeah woo let's go
Everyone is super nice  we all know each other game play is even better.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, glad you are having fun!

reviews.review_title: Game is great I love it
reviews.review_description: The game is great because it combines Ironman and Spiderman into 1 character and the controls are easy to figure out (if you are wondering why the game won’t let you join it’s down for maintenance)

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting everyone know aaron!

reviews.review_description: A very great game. I love the spider man/iron man feel. Pretty Good story. Love the missions and npc interactions. Would play it even without the tag, race and other game modes

ITS SO FUN… but there’s not as many people as I would
 like so everyone if you see plz get the game
I still gets notifications and i can't change it. I didn't wanted it.
A
The tagging is better and the movement is better and I am actually good at this game unlike gorilla tag its just a good game
I got this game a couple of days ago while looking around and yesterday was the first day I actually played it and it was so fun I meet new friends and played it for a solid 2 hours.

reviews.review_title: Best game I’ve played for a while
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and very addicting it has a good community and lots of game modes 10/10
Can't play, as lobbies are all full of children who certainly aren't old enough to be on vr, screaming about fortnite

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving us a review! We're sorry you had trouble playing. By the way, you can mute other players in a lobby in the game settings. You can also join our discord to connect with friendly players looking for a game! verticalshift.net/discord

reviews.review_description: Everyone I've meet has been really nice

Vertical Shift has an amazing blueprint for what the full game can and should be. The parkour & swinging mechanics (while unbalanced) are incredibly fun, the controls are intuitive, and the game is overall just super fun to play. 

Don’t expect a complete game though, it definitely is still applab quality. Monotone voice announcers, lag, unbalanced mechanics, and other early access issues are in this game. But it’s so fun that I can ignore the small issues I have and just have fun. 

I look forward to seeing how the developers continue this game and will continue playing it actively. 

Try this out. It’s really fun.
I got this game today and I already like it

This game, is professional, incredible, amazing, and very entertaining VR game. The movement and mechanics of the game are easy to learn, but hard to master. i personally am in love with the freeze tag game mode, but the rest are incredible to, (there are a variety to choose from.) This is a very well made game and has much potential. I believe this game will sky rocket, some time soon.
 
Incredible job to the creators.

I've been playing this game for a little while and met some really cool people (mostly in freeze tag). There are a bunch of different game modes like freeze tag, infection, race, hot seat, and a single player mode. Please keep in mind this game is still in development and you will likely experience bugs, and other issues while playing but for the most part it's very smooth. The players are usually really nice but you'll occasionally run into the kids who think they're good then start getting toxic when they lose like you will with any other game. It isn't nearly as bad as games like gorilla tag with toxicity. Please play the tutorial instead of just running into a game mode blindly. If you don't know how to play it could cost you the whole game and your team will not be happy. This is your friendly reminder to save your team mates. Bye!!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games i have played
reviews.review_description: I realy enjoyed playing this game, the way that you can descover your own game mecanics in it, make your own movement style, it is truly amazing

developer_response.body: We are so glad you're enjoying Vertical Shift!

reviews.review_description: Honestly one of the more enjoyable games I have on my quest it's rather relaxing and just fun in general  movement is outstanding  communities amazing and very supportive as well definitely a game you should play^^

There is so much to do in this game, from different game mode to different quests but something that catches all of our attentions is the fact that… your literally spiderman. Oh what’s that you said you don’t like spiderman. Well lucky for you, there’s also Ironman!!! Over all this is a really fun game with alot of different things to do and I would totally recommend it to Marvel fans and anyone who likes superheroes in general.
Basically a spiderman and iron man game with freeze tag and all that lot!
This is one one of the best games with a kind player back I just wish it had more people playing it
if you want a game that is competitive and fast paced get it now. It is so fun!

Your parents are murdered in front of your eyes while you get bitten by a radioactive spider in a prison cave which forces you to make jet gloves...
At least that's how I imagine this super hero would be explained. 

Really fun & innovative game & movement. I haven't even played any games yet. I've just been enjoying flying around the futuristic post-apocalyptic cyberpunk city. 

Really look forward to see this game continue to develop.

I am really surprised with this game.
It's like being iron-man and spider-man at the same time !!

I love flying through the sky with the thrusters of my hands and swinging between the buildings with the grapples.

You have several modes to play and the multiplayer is a lot of fun being able to participate in several game modes, including races and an infection mode.

The aesthetic of the city is very cyberpunk and the setting is very successful.

A ten for this game that has many possibilities.

As soon as I realized it, I was hooked.

Recommended 100% if you want to feel like a super-hero.
Vertical shift is such a great game. I been having fun playing with my friends and helping the community. I would give the game a 10 out of 5 if I could but 10 is bigger than 5.
lol game released on my bday
I love this concept, the game, and the team behind it. They're working so hard to make this game as fun as possible :) It's free, so try it out and see what you think!

The game had me at concept? Fly around a futuristic city like spider-man or zip from building to building like I'm in attack on titan? What more could I ask for?? Then they gave me more! It's crazy how fun the missions are. They test your skills and really make you master the mechanics. The online is fun too! Different styles games and such a fun thriving community make this game a must have for kids and even grown folks! The only thing thing I want more of is customization but I heard that's coming as well so can't wait!

5/5 would recommend!

Haven't played much. tutorial, 1st mission and a multiplayer match. I tried to do the prison escape mission and it says avoid lasers and shoot green boxes but there are no lasers or green boxes. Please fix that! But I'm still giving 5 stars because this game is free and more fun than most of the paid games in my library. You feel like Iron Man and spider Man and batman all in one.
Amazing game mechanics and a welcoming comp community !
This is the best game that I have on my Oculus right now it is so worth it I feel like A superhero

This is easily on the top five of must have games on your quest. These developers made something special here, with a fun and interesting movement style, and interesting and intuitive pvp games. Highly highly highly recommend!!!!

reviews.review_title: My fav VR e sport game!
reviews.review_description: this game is a brilliant combination of skilled locomotion and a bunch of endlessly fun e sport games (definitely worth it especially since its free!)

reviews.review_title: THIS FEELS LIKE IM A MARVEL SUPER HERO
reviews.review_description: I love just swinging and thrusting through the city and finding people to interact with and trying out the 10 game modes they have great game great story and great fun

The movement in this game makes you feel like a superhero, that was enough for me to be interested! Throw in the multiplayer and fun game modes, this is an amazing game, lots of possibilities for the future and updates too!
I truly believe that with its one of a kind movement options,vertical shift is paving the way for vr Esports. A great time for anyone who chooses to play.

The the movement in this game is AWESOME
You have grappling hooks on both hands to swing like spiderman
AND boosters on hands to fly like iron man
AND a glider on back to glide like batman
This game is a VR masterpiece and it makes you feel like spiderman!!! 5 stars 100%
This game is so fun! The swinging and flying took a second to get used to, but the multiplayer is so much fun to play with friends!

This game takes the best of high mobility and action into one fantastic game!!

The community is great and the developers are heavily involved. 

Swinging around and soaring the city is such a unique and fun experience.

This is a competitive game to keep an eye out for! Really excited for the future of this game!

Highly recommend giving this game a try!
Awesome game 🫠
Please make it so you don’t have to put in a email

developer_response.body:
Hi tyler.92754,

We just updated our game, and you no longer have to make an account, it is handled automatically, no emails!

Thanks for your feedback

reviews.review_description:
As a VR esports fanatic, this game is very fun to play! Fast movement, teamwork (or solo skill), and the excitement of playing against good players, all make for an amazing competitive VR experience.

The dedicated community is comprised of all amazing people. There are monthly tournaments held in the discord. The devs are all active and friendly. Everyone cares a lot about this game!

If you are a fan of games like Echo Arena or Gorilla Tag, then this game might just be your next passion game that you practice for hours a day. This game makes me sweat (physically) more than any other VR game I have played. 

The devs gave me money because I am good at the game (:<    (tournament winnings)
You can make a guy break up with his boyfriend and get him to join your cause.

ive played and tested this game quite a bit within the past 2 years. and I can say for certain that this is a great game! and as I said this is an unbiased review so im not going to base my review off of other experiences, for example: interactions with devs (although they are very nice) 

ive spent a lot of time looking for a cool swinging VR game and Vertical Shift scratched that itch, very well. swinging and gliding through a big city or through the multiplayer courses is very fun. and i like to do cool tricks while swinging. multiplayer with people is fun and sometimes there are tournaments too. the community is great and i have not encountered many "gorilla-tag-like" players.

in conclusion, download this game if you like to have fun

reviews.review_title: Best Free Game on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description: Super fun game, even though it does have quite a few bugs. Still, it's easily the best free game on Meta Quest

developer_response.body: Thank you! Feel free to report bugs here verticalshift.net/bugs !
